_note: Maxy's personal recommendations, shown as a gold callout on matching items. Keyed by tool category, then by the item's display name. Each rec has optional `lines` (label + text rows) and/or `note` (free text). Add entries as you go.

lines.label: Attacking
lines.text: A-tier PvP. S-tier for NPCs — great for Rift.

lines.label: Defending
lines.text: A-tier if you're holding one wall or about to lose a wall. Solid enough for offline defence.

lines.label: Attacking
lines.text: B/C tier — much better choices out there, especially for PvP. Interesting kit for wall wipes though, where it can push A/S.

lines.label: Defending
lines.text: S-tier. One of, if not the best, double-flanking defence commander — huge extra courtyard capacity and wall limit. Also great for Khan defence with Way of Perfection + Endless Practice.

lines.label: Attacking
lines.text: S-tier. Incredibly strong — the best PvP general, just very expensive to max out.

lines.label: Defending
lines.text: B-tier. Not much experience seeing it on defence; there are simply better options.

lines.label: Attacking
lines.text: A/S tier. A GS general that's very easy to get — very solid in PvP, performs better than Toril overall.

lines.label: Defending
lines.text: C-tier. Don't bother — better options in Horatio / Sasaki.
